Authors: Costa G.; Nakamura Q.; Lopes Q.; Silva K.
Title: Towards sustainable drone-based field surveying: a longitudinal study (case 1)
Affiliations: Department of Agricultural Engineering, Example University, Example City, Country
Authors with affiliations: Costa G., Department of Agricultural Engineering, Example University; Nakamura Q., Department of Agricultural Engineering, Example University; Lopes Q., Department of Agricultural Engineering, Example University; Silva K., Department of Agricultural Engineering, Example University
Abstract: This study investigates drone-based field surveying in the context of modern agricultural production systems. We propose a methodology combining low-cost sensors with greenhouse experiments to assess feasibility and performance. Results indicate measurable improvements in data collection reliability compared to conventional practice, with three replicate trials showing consistent trends. The findings contribute to the growing body of work on drone-based field surveying and provide practical guidance for practitioners and policy makers seeking to adopt similar technologies at scale.
